name: Insta360 X4 Utility Frame
description: This Utility Frame is designed to protect your Insta360 X4 camera while adding more mounting points for accessories to complete your loadout. A hinged design allows you to simply side your camera inside and snap the top closed without requiring tools.

features.Key Features: Protective Frame for X4 | Maintains Access to Camera Ports | Easy Installation with Hinged Top Panel | Two Cold Shoe Mounts | Fold-Out 2-Prong Mount | Detachable 2-Prong Mounting Bracket | Silicone Lens Cover | Vertical or Horizontal Mounting
features.What's In The Box: Insta360 Utility Frame for X4 | Silicone Lens Cover | 2-Prong Mount Adapter | Allen Key
